text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yo, get this—today's my birthday too! That makes us frontrunner twins and twin twins—how cool is that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
We thought we might as well celebrate together,
so we went looking for ya.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha. I'm always busy with my part-time jobs,
so I appreciate the chance to have some fun with
y'all!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
For real, everything's more hype together! Let's
get some good vibes going! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
That's it, now you're vibing! Now we gotta keep
the energy up all night!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Common sense, what's that? Tonight is our
getaway. ♪ 'Cause we the birthday twins, the life
of the partaaay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: All right! C'mon Ines, ride the rhythm!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(Is it just me... or did I just get dragged into something
even more demanding than work...)
